evidence_spans.span: Maximum likelihood estimation uses the log-likelihood as its objective and selects a parameter value that maximizes it
The score function is the derivative of the log-likelihood with respect to the parameter
At an interior differentiable optimum, an MLE candidate satisfies the score equation s(θ)=0.

results.rationale: Maximum likelihood estimation requires the score function because the score equation s(θ)=0 is used to find the MLE candidate.
